raw_consumer_statement: I was charged for 2 times with amount of {$560.00} from merchant name XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. I contacted Barclays Bank to report this fraud as never received anything from that merchant as well as did not know the merchant. After about one month, Barclays charged back me for those transaction and said that the transactions were valid and I am liable for those charges. I told them provide me any proof from merchant what kind of goods or services they sent to me, In fact I never received anything from that merchant, even with an email confirmation. I researched the merchant name online and found out there were so many report scam of that merchant, however Barclays ask me to pay for those fraudulent charges. Barclays supported those scammers.
